affected_pattern: Customer billing record has NULL TotalCharges indicating billing record processing failure
root_cause: billing record format mismatch after network element upgrade — the billing record format changed but the mediation system was not updated, causing field parsing failures and NULL values in billing records.
supporting_evidence: Billing Record Failure RCA Playbook: Format Mismatch After Network Upgrade pattern
Network upgrade event logged 24 hours before failures started
billing record rejection logs show format-specific parsing errors
recommended_action: Update billing billing mediation layer billing record parsing rules for new format
Reprocess all rejected billing records since the network upgrade
Validate end-to-end billing record processing after fix
Add format validation to pre-upgrade checklist
